title: The Final Days of Huntr OSS: One Night, Three Reports, and $1,625 in Bounties
excerpt: Before Huntr shut down its traditional open-source bug bounty program and shifted toward Huntr 2.0, I returned to the platform one last time, discovered three vulnerabilities in NLTK in less than twelve hours alongside GPT-5.5 Ultra, and ultimately received $1,625 in bounties.
author: @khanhdlq

title: The Night I Decided to Kill Frida
excerpt: Frida is a dynamic instrumentation toolkit for developers, reverse-engineers, and security researchers. This post chronicles the night I decided to stop using Frida and the reasons behind it.
author: @hibana
